title: Week 08 - Array Statistics and Extremes
description: Practice finding an extreme value in an array.

questions.title: Find the Highest Score

description.statement: Return the maximum value in the score array.
description.input: One non-empty array table of scores.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(scores)
    local best = scores[1]
    for i = 2, #scores do
        if scores[i] > best then
            best = scores[i]
        end
    end
    return best
end
